description_long: This house features a simple rectangular structure with a steep black gable roof and white exterior walls. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by wooden posts, with a small set of steps leading up to the main entrance. Windows are symmetrically arranged on both the front and rear sides, with a mix of single and double window units. The left side of the house is mostly solid with minimal fenestration, while the right side features a large set of windows and an extended wooden deck. The deck is bordered by a railing and provides an outdoor space accessible from the house. The overall design is clean and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on practicality.
description: A two-story white house with a steep black gable roof, symmetrical windows, a covered front porch, and a wooden side deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, and symmetrical windows above.
description_view_1: Left side view with a mostly solid wall, a single door, and minimal windows; the wooden deck is visible extending from the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two pairs of windows on each floor, with no porch or deck visible.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting a large set of windows and the wooden deck with railing.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with wooden posts, small steps, and a single main door
